title: The Wizard — (Eddy's father Kol?) — Pool-arc antagonist
bodyText:
The mortal mastermind running the **cult** around the Pool. Ancient — kept alive far past a mortal span by the Pool itself. **Present at the Pool: he is this arc's antagonist** (party + any summoned allies vs. his operation, with Lolth's drow crashing in as a third force).

# Likely identity (strong lean, grill 2026-07-09)
**Good chance he is Kol — Eddy's father from Shipton**, from long, long ago (which is *why* he's ancient; the Pool sustains him). If so he fathered **Edrelon** — the very Shipton mind now riding in Eddy ([[pc-eddy]]). The confrontation is Eddy meeting the father of the man he half-is.

# Motive — twisted Torm / holy self-sacrifice
He caught the calling of **Torm** (duty, loyalty, **self-sacrifice**) and, after the Pool revealed how it works, **twisted it into a doctrine that all life should sacrifice itself into the Pool as part of Torm's plan.** A sincere zealot, not a nihilist — which is far scarier than the earlier "power-hoarder" read. He still doesn't grasp (or has rationalized) that he's feeding the harvest ([[the-pool]]).

**He is a dupe.** The *true* Torm opposes this — a **false god wearing Torm's face** is the one "answering" Kol and steering the sacrifices ([[torm]]).

> [!dm] Decide / design:
> - **The Shipton fall (lean, grill 2026-07-09):** he was *testing* self-sacrifice — **burned his daughter Trista** — the town revolted to burn his church, and in panic he **summoned (maybe accidentally) the wave/Pool** that drowned Shipton. He took it as divine confirmation and spiralled deeper. ("The Priest's Descent" — see [[shipton]].) Eddy's fractured memories ARE this atrocity. Not fully locked.
> - **Is Torm real & complicit, or is this heresy Torm would reject?** (Ties to [[thread-gods-shift]].)
> - Name/face; his cult's on-the-ground shape; relationship to [[mr-spells]] (separate figure).
